item.name: Yato-no-kami
item.description:
This wavekin makes an appearance in the folklore of Yanxia, where it is depicted as a demon who leaves the land fallow. Best eat it to prevent the tales coming true.

[Suitable for printing on large canvases.]

fish.guide: Yanxian legend tells of an ancient demon that once haunted the region, siphoning its nutrients and preventing the people from cultivating their land. A group of brave monks risked life and limb to seal it away and cast it into a spectral current, consigning it to a life of eternal wandering.
